positive: A stylized, symmetrical jungle flora and fauna arrangement, featuring lush monstera leaves, vibrant orchids, whimsical tropical birds, and subtly silhouetted exotic animals like hummingbirds and playful macaques. The style should be a blend of Art Deco poster art and modern botanical illustration, rendered with clean, bold linework and striking flat color blocking. Composition must be central and highly adaptable for a vertical or square apparel print. Lighting should be bright, high-key, and diffuse, creating strong outlines and deep, saturated jewel tones (emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and gold accents). The background should be solid, muted off-white or light cream to ensure high contrast and print readability. The overall mood is joyful, energetic, and sophisticated. Highly detailed, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, lowres, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, messy, grain, jpeg artifacts, photo, photorealism, depth of field
